footer.locations_error: We could not load locations right now. Please try again in a moment.

posts.title: Latest Updates
posts.subtitle: News & Events
posts.empty_desc: Check back soon for updates, events, and announcements.

reviews.title: Guest Experience
reviews.subtitle: What Our Guests Say
reviews.empty_desc: Be the first to share your experience with us.

upgrade.default_description: This feature requires a paid plan.

qa-writeback.title: Ask a question
qa-writeback.description: Let guests submit questions directly from your site, synced back to Google Business Q&A. Included in Growth.

custom-domain.title: Custom domain
custom-domain.description: Connect your own domain (yourdomain.com) instead of a krabiclaw.com subdomain. Included in Growth.

add-location.title: Add a second location
add-location.description: Manage multiple locations under one brand site, each with their own menu, reviews, and hours. Included in Managed.

connect-gmb.title: Connect Google Business
connect-gmb.description: Sync hours, reviews, photos, and posts automatically from your Google Business Profile. Included in Growth.

google-business-sync.title: Google Business sync
google-business-sync.description: Auto-sync Google Business fields while keeping manual edits available in the site editor. Included in Growth.

remove-branding.title: Remove KrabiClaw branding
remove-branding.description: Remove the "Powered by krabiclaw.com" footer strip from your tenant site. Included in Managed.

bullets.gmb_1: Auto-fill Google Business fields when connected
bullets.gmb_2: Keep manual edits available in the content editor
bullets.gmb_3: Sync business details, hours, photos, reviews, and posts
bullets.default_3: Keep the rest of your current site setup

about.default_description: Discover what makes us unique and come experience it for yourself.

qa.title: Questions & Answers
qa.subtitle: Common Inquiries
qa.empty_prompt: Got a question? Ask us anything and we'll be happy to help.

menu_page.coming_soon_desc: Our menu for {location} is being prepared.
menu_page.allergens_desc: Please tell your server about any allergies, we adjust most dishes.

reviews_page.title: What guests are saying
reviews_page.no_reviews_desc: Be the first to share your experience with us on Google.
reviews_page.no_match_desc: Switch filter, or read all reviews.
reviews_page.leave_review_desc: It shows up here automatically within 24 hours. Honest words help us, and the next guest deciding where to eat.

qa_page.title: Frequently asked
qa_page.subtitle: Q&A · {location}
qa_page.ask_us: Ask us, it'll show up here.
qa_page.no_questions_desc: Be the first to ask, our team usually responds within a few hours.

contact_page.title: Contact
contact_page.headline: Get in touch.
contact_page.specific_questions: For specific questions about hours, parking, or a reservation, the individual location pages will get you a faster answer.
contact_page.reply_within: We'll reply within a working day. For anything urgent, call the room directly.
contact_page.message_sent: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.
contact_page.message_failed: Failed to send message. Please try again.
contact_page.for_visit: For a reservation or visit, head to your nearest location, for press, partnerships, catering or anything else, use the form below.

reservation_cancel.title: Cancel reservation
reservation_cancel.cancelled_desc: Your reservation for {date} has been cancelled. We hope to see you another time!
reservation_cancel.invalid_link_desc: We couldn't find a reservation matching this link. It may have already been cancelled or expired.
